meaning: adj.使干燥的,去湿的n.干燥剂
examples: Different desiccative effect would be obtained if the parameters and the settle time of material on the desiccative disc were adjusted.
Scutellaria extractive: scutellaria extractive is the active component which comes from the desiccative radix of scutellaria belonging to labiatae.
Cape jasmine extractive: cape jasmine extractive is the active component which comes from the desiccative ripe fruit of the cape jasmine belonging to gamene family.
